---
title: "Md Ragib Rownak"
image: images/profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rownak01
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:rownak.1@osu.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ragibrownak
    - text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YHr3XgYAAAAJ&hl=en
---

## About Me

I am a PhD candidate in Mechanical Engineering at [The Ohio State University](https://www.osu.edu/) ([Center for Automotive Research](https://car.osu.edu/)), graduating in December 2026. My research focuses on **aging-aware optimal control of electrified powertrains**, where I develop AI/ML-driven solutions that bridge physics-based component aging models with learning-based control algorithms.

I work at the intersection of **deep reinforcement learning**, **Transformer-based generative models**, and **physics-informed modeling** to improve the efficiency, reliability, and sustainability of next-generation hybrid and electric vehicles. My work is conducted in collaboration with [Cummins Inc.](https://www.cummins.com/)

Prior to my PhD, I served as a Lecturer in Mechanical Engineering at Bangladesh Army University of Science and Technology, and I hold a B.S. from Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET).

## Research Interests

- AI/ML for control and decision-making in complex engineering systems
- Deep reinforcement learning (SAC, PPO, GRPO) for real-time optimal control
- Physics-informed generative models (Transformers) for degradation prediction
- Multi-objective optimization under uncertainty
- Sustainable and intelligent transportation and energy systems

## Education

**The Ohio State University** | Columbus, OH

- Ph.D. in Mechanical Engineering | Jan 2021 -- Dec 2026 (expected)
- M.S. in Mechanical Engineering | Dec 2023

**Bangladesh University of Engineering & Technology** | Dhaka, Bangladesh

- B.S. in Mechanical Engineering | Oct 2018

## News

- **Mar 2026** -- Submitted "Ranking-Augmented Policy Optimization for Constrained Control" to IEEE CDC
- **Feb 2026** -- New preprint: "Physics-Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Energy and Aging Management in Electrified Powertrains"
- **Dec 2025** -- Preprint posted: "Learning Battery Aging Dynamics using Physics-Informed Transformer"
- **Jun 2025** -- Presenting at IEEE ITEC 2025 on aging model robustness for heavy-duty EVs
- **Apr 2025** -- Paper presented at SAE WCX 2025 on powertrain aging model selection
